description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern silhouette with straight, clean lines and a deep, wide seat. The upholstery is a muted teal fabric with a subtle, slightly mottled texture, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. Thick, removable seat and back cushions provide ample comfort, while the armrests are broad and fully padded, matching the overall geometric design. The chair stands on four slender, metallic legs with a gold finish, adding a touch of elegance and elevating the piece above the ground. The backrest is straight and medium-height, offering support without being overly tall or ornate. The overall look is contemporary and versatile, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern teal armchair with broad padded armrests, removable cushions, and slim gold metal legs. The upholstery has a soft, subtly textured finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick armrest and cushion profile, with gold metal legs visible beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, two large side cushions, and the straight backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, with metallic legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the straight, fully upholstered back and both armrests, with all four legs visible.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, padded and upholstered rectangular armrests
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, fully upholstered backrest with a removable cushion
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle mottled texture
